metadata.compliance_note: Placeholder entries marked N/A per Golden Schema directive

integration_notes.MCP: Handles external integrations (e.g., GitHub, Google Drive).
integration_notes.event_driven: Event triggers dynamically insert new subtasks (e.g., real-time data updates).
integration_notes.predictive_rerouting: ML models reroute tasks if uptime score < 0.8.
integration_notes.meta_reasoning: Agents negotiate ownership and invent tools via A2A messaging.
integration_notes.HITL_activation: Triggers human review for high-risk domains (e.g., national_security, healthcare).
integration_notes.SSL_validation: Enforced via Azure Key Vault and certifi for secure API communication.
